[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1111111111 a
3 0010111110 6
4 1001111001 6
5 1100110010 5
6 1111111110 9
7 1111111101 9

01 10 1111111111 a match 0 1 2
12 21 1111011111 9
23 32 1111101111 9
34 43 1111111110 9 match 6
45 54 1111110101 8
56 65 1111001111 8
67 76 0111011111 8
70 07 1111111111 a match 0 1 2

02 20 1111101111 9
13 31 1111111110 9 match 6
24 42 1111111101 9 match 7
35 53 1111101011 8
46 64 1111111111 a match 0 1 2
57 75 1111011101 8
60 06 1111101111 9
71 17 0111011111 8

03 30 1101101011 7
14 41 1110110110 7
25 52 1111001101 7
36 63 1111101111 9
47 74 1111111101 9 match 7
50 05 1111101011 8
61 16 0111011111 8
72 27 1111011101 8

04 40 1111111111 a match 0 1 2
15 51 1111010111 8
26 62 1111001111 8
37 73 1111111111 a match 0 1 2
